hooks.command: printf '\033]1337;SetUserVar=%s=%s\007' claude_status $(echo -n idle | base64) && printf '\033]1337;SetUserVar=%s=%s\007' claude_project $(echo -n ${PWD##*/} | base64)
printf '\033]1337;SetUserVar=%s=%s\007' claude_status $(echo -n running | base64) && printf '\033]1337;SetUserVar=%s=%s\007' claude_start_time $(echo -n $(date +%s) | base64)

printf '\033]1337;SetUserVar=%s=%s\007' claude_status $(echo -n blocked | base64) && terminal-notifier -title '🔐 Permission Needed' -message "Approve in ${PWD##*/}" -group "$PWD:perm" -sound Basso -execute "/opt/homebrew/bin/wezterm cli activate-pane --pane-id $WEZTERM_PANE" -activate com.github.wez.wezterm

printf '\033]1337;SetUserVar=%s=%s\007' claude_status $(echo -n waiting | base64) && terminal-notifier -title '🔔 Claude Waiting' -message "Needs input in ${PWD##*/}" -group "$PWD:input" -sound Basso -execute "/opt/homebrew/bin/wezterm cli activate-pane --pane-id $WEZTERM_PANE" -activate com.github.wez.wezterm

printf '\033]1337;SetUserVar=%s=%s\007' claude_status $(echo -n idle | base64) && terminal-notifier -title '⏸️ Claude Idle' -message "Done in ${PWD##*/}" -group "$PWD" -sound default -execute "/opt/homebrew/bin/wezterm cli activate-pane --pane-id $WEZTERM_PANE" -activate com.github.wez.wezterm
